column1: 鈴木さんの代わりに、私が会議に出席します。
column2: すずきさんのかわりに、わたしがかいぎにしゅっせきします。
column3: I will attend the meeting in Suzuki-san's place.
column4: 代わりに (instead of / in place of / in exchange for)
column5: Noun + の + 代わりに / Verb[dict] + 代わりに
column6: substituting one thing/action for another; 'instead of X, Y' or 'in exchange for X, Y'
column8: 代わりに = substitution or exchange; に代わって = on behalf of (taking over role); むしろ = rather (preference); 代替 = substitute (noun)
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:代わりに source:authored scaffold:pending-audio source:shin-kanzen frequency:low complexity:standard
